# Clubero

> Clubero is a mobile-first app for amateur and semi-pro sports clubs to coordinate events, send convocations, track attendance, and communicate with players and parents — without losing messages in WhatsApp.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and value proposition.
- [Features](/features): Convocations, attendance, club communication, statistics.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans for clubs of any size.
- [FAQ](/faq): Answers to common questions about Clubero.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the Clubero team.
- [Demo](/demo): Request a guided demonstration.

## Optional

- [Login](/login): Sign in to your club account.
- [Register](/register): Create a new club account.
- [Terms](/legal/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy](/legal/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Cookies](/legal/cookies): Cookie policy.
